title: SA Fire Watch: Protecting lives, property, and assets for 16 years
description: BUSINESS NEWS - SA Fire Watch has been...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - SA Fire Watch has been safeguarding lives, property and assets in the Western Cape for over 16 years.


> We are a trusted fire safety and compliance provider, offering complete end-to-end solutions that give our customers true peace of mind.


Our diverse client base spans the commercial, construction, industrial, marine, residential, and educational sectors.

We specialise in the installation, supply, maintenance and servicing of fire equipment, as well as fire engineering designs that meet all regulatory fire safety and compliance requirements for occupancy.

At SA Fire Watch, we also provide tailored Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) training, including the correct use of fire equipment, emergency evacuation procedures and fire drills.

Our pre-engineered gas fire suppression systems are designed to combat Class A, B and C fires. They are eco-friendly and safe for use around sensitive data, devices, humans and animals.


> Why choose SA Fire Watch?


- Fire safety designs that deliver full end-to-end compliance;
- Expert product knowledge and fully trained professionals;
- Solutions that support your carbon offset goals;
- Revolutionary systems accredited in accordance with SANS 14520, Automatic Sprinkler Inspection Bureau (ASIB), SABS, SAQCC, SANS 10400, SANS 10139, Local Authority Regulations and the Occupational Health and Safety Act (OHSA);
- A commitment that goes beyond equipment, we honour the legacy of fire, recognising it not only as an industrial necessity but as a force we can shape, protect and master.

No matter the terrain, SA Fire Watch is ready and equipped to serve you. We believe it is possible to protect lives, property and assets while also caring for the environment and building a sustainable future.

For more information email: [email protected]

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
